reasoning_content: The issue is CMake uses `YATCC_LLVM_DIR` from `config.cmake` which is `${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/llvm`, and the RISCV generated files need to be at `${YATCC_LLVM_DIR}/task5/include`. The files do exist there. But the CMakeLists.txt in task5 uses `${YATCC_LLVM_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/Target/RISCV` which should be `${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/llvm/llvm/lib/Target/RISCV`. Let me check if that exists.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "ls /workspace/YatCC/llvm/llvm/lib/Target/RISCV/ 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo \"---\"; ls /workspace/YatCC/llvm/llvm/ 2>/dev/null | head -5", "summary": "Check LLVM RISCV source tree"}
